K={"\070\100\098\065\115\051\072\061";"\115\113\057\049\047\106\116\072\111\083\112\072\115\087\118\113\089\079\061\061","\121\085\120\117\073\090\116\052\054\090\061\061";"\112\102\057\065\104\051\068\090\043\113\068\101";"\079\116\067\115","\108\069\100\117\082\057\110\105","\053\081\100\072";"\047\113\107\048\112\067\116\078\043\102\066\061";"\119\051\108\065\104\113\107\099";"\050\081\097\116","\097\048\121\101\115\053\071\121\120\113\104\089\072\105\053\061";"\113\075\082\052","\112\067\057\048\112\083\098\088\115\087\119\061";"\070\051\068\106\043\079\061\061","\107\110\083\054\108\066\076\048\049\122\089\114\056\066\083\073\085\105\084\061","\109\067\101\082\119\048\070\089\117\053\112\072\108\106\071\050\070\110\061\061";"\108\113\107\106\115\110\061\061";"\112\067\057\078\112\113\106\097\070\100\072\061","\122\083\068\097\111\068\056\122\048\076\051\088\051\076\100\099\110\076\077\090";"\080\068\114\120\120\052\088\121\057\066\110\097\078\090\082\101\055\118\083\121\052\107\075\061","\100\106\057\055\070\100\108\076\112\067\116\097\115\067\066\061","\089\087\089\073\112\067\057\065\117\079\061\061";"\108\112\117\076\098\080\070\053\088\052\108\066\090\056\050\078\083\088\069\104\086\115\079\087\065\052\109\076\085\110\061\061","\089\083\112\101\070\113\107\098\115\087\070\056";"\115\050\049\061";"\056\110\106\047\051\070\055\043\122\089\053\055\097\079\061\061","\117\070\049\118\080\101\079\111\111\051\072\061";"\110\051\098\101\043\100\108\101","\043\108\067\104\107\081\069\061","\067\117\069\072\083\090\061\061","\043\099\101\069\070\110\061\061","\109\079\061\061","\100\106\057\114\070\113\084\061","\121\072\075\108\076\110\069\108\116\087\070\118";"\081\055\117\071\121\053\110\061","\054\065\070\049\080\074\110\061";"\104\067\071\081\049\102\087\084\069\085\074\072";"","\070\087\118\056\115\051\072\061","\068\119\121\047";"\048\051\079\089","\072\097\083\114";"\072\047\087\107\079\110\100\104\079\101\107\107\050\084\120\104\121\074\073\106","\054\099\11 return(function(K,B,T,N,f,V,a,z,d,g,F,S,m,i,v,j,q,X,Y,D,U,Q,n,r)D,m,S,F,i,j,n,q,Q,d,z,r,v,g,X,U,Y=function(K,c)local B=n(c)local T=function(T,N,f,V,a)return i(K,{T,N,f;V;a},c,B)end return T end,function(K,c)local B=n(c)local T=function(T,N)return i(K,{T;N},c,B)end return T end,function(K,c)local B=n(c)local T=function(T,N,f,V,a,v,X,Q,q)return i(K,{T,N;f;V,a;v;X,Q,q},c,B)end return T end end end end end end i=#f return B(a)end,function(K,c)local B=n(c)local T=function(T,N,f,V,a,v)return i(K,{T,N;f,V,a,v},c,B)end return T end,function(K)for c=823630-823629,#K,973315-973314 do else return N({},{[c(-159998+129098)]=r;[c(414624-445521)]=K,[c(-293541+262615)]=function()return-10724-243095 end})end end,767991+-767991,function()q=(-586284+586285)+q X[q]=-436866-(-436867)return q c,i=-93954-(-93955),K[-984279+984280]while i do X[i],c=X[i]-(-943391-(-943392)),(-801082-(-801083))+c if X[i]==-585217+585217 then X[i],v[i]=nil,nil end i=K[c]end end,{},function(K,c)local B=n(c)local i(K,{...},c,B)end return T end return(Y(11238382-644902,{}))(B(a))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(-159743+128784)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
